mapper.select:
SELECT w.order_id AS orderId, w.product_id AS productId, w.line_id AS lineId, w.order_qty AS orderQty, -- 목표(지시수량) w.priority, w.status, w.created_at AS createdAt, w.updated_at AS updatedAt, w.order_manager AS orderManager,
p.product_name AS productName, p.unit, l.line_name AS lineName,
( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT cl.client_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM work_order_client_order woco JOIN client_order co ON woco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id WHERE woco.work_order_id = w.order_id ) AS clientName,
w.due_date AS dueDate,
-- 재고(제품별 합계) IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty, IFNULL(ps.available_qty, 0) AS availableQty,
-- 누적/잔여 (양품 누적만 목표 달성 판단) COALESCE(pr_sum.produced_qty, 0) AS producedQty, -- 양품 누적 COALESCE(pr_sum.defect_qty, 0) AS defectQty, -- 불량 누적 GREATEST(w.order_qty - COALESCE(pr_sum.produced_qty, 0), 0) AS remainingQty,
-- (호환용) 기존 requiredQty 컬럼 유지 w.order_qty AS requiredQty
FROM work_order w LEFT JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_line l ON w.line_id = l.line_id
-- 재고 집계 JOIN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(stock_qty) AS stock_qty, SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved_qty, SUM(available_qty) AS available_qty, SUM(safe_qty) AS safe_qty FROM product_stock GROUP BY product_id ) ps ON ps.product_id = w.product_id
-- 실적 집계 JOIN (양품 = actual - defect, 음수방지) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(GREATEST(actual_qty - COALESCE(defect_qty,0), 0)) AS produced_qty, SUM(COALESCE(defect_qty,0)) AS defect_qty FROM production_result GROUP BY order_id ) pr_sum ON pr_sum.order_id = w.order_id
w.is_deleted = FALSE
AND ( w.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order_client_order woco JOIN client_order co ON woco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id WHERE woco.work_order_id = w.order_id AND cl.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
AND w.status = #{status}
AND DATE(w.created_at) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(w.created_at) <= #{endDate}
ORDER BY
CASE w.priority WHEN 'EMERGENCY' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
ASC DESC ASC
CASE w.status WHEN 'WAITING' THEN 1 WHEN 'READY' THEN 2 WHEN 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 3 WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
ASC DESC ASC
w.order_id
ASC DESC ASC
w.created_at
ASC DESC DESC
w.due_date IS NULL, w.due_date
ASC DESC ASC
w.order_qty
ASC DESC DESC
p.product_name
ASC DESC ASC
COALESCE(l.line_name, CAST(w.line_id AS CHAR))
ASC DESC ASC
CASE WHEN w.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, w.created_at DESC
CASE WHEN w.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, w.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT w.order_id AS orderId, w.product_id AS productId, w.line_id AS lineId, w.order_qty AS orderQty, w.priority, w.status, w.created_at AS createdAt, w.updated_at AS updatedAt, w.remarks AS remarks, w.order_manager AS orderManager,
p.product_name AS productName, p.unit, l.line_name AS lineName,
( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT cl.client_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM work_order_client_order woco JOIN client_order co ON woco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id WHERE woco.work_order_id = w.order_id ) AS clientName,
w.due_date AS dueDate,
IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty, IFNULL(ps.available_qty, 0) AS availableQty,
COALESCE(pr_sum.produced_qty, 0) AS producedQty, COALESCE(pr_sum.defect_qty, 0) AS defectQty, GREATEST(w.order_qty - COALESCE(pr_sum.produced_qty, 0), 0) AS remainingQty,
w.order_qty AS requiredQty
FROM work_order w LEFT JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_line l ON w.line_id = l.line_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(stock_qty) AS stock_qty, SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved_qty, SUM(available_qty) AS available_qty, SUM(safe_qty) AS safe_qty FROM product_stock GROUP BY product_id ) ps ON ps.product_id = w.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(GREATEST(actual_qty - COALESCE(defect_qty,0), 0)) AS produced_qty, SUM(COALESCE(defect_qty,0)) AS defect_qty FROM production_result WHERE order_id = #{orderId} GROUP BY order_id ) pr_sum ON pr_sum.order_id = w.order_id
WHERE w.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT DISTINCT co.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, cod.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.unit AS unit, co.client_id AS clientId, cl.client_name AS clientName, co.cl_order_date AS clOrderDate, co.cl_delivery_date AS dueDate, cod.order_qty AS orderQty, IFNULL(ps.available_qty, 0) AS availableQty, -- 가용재고 합 GREATEST(cod.order_qty - IFNULL(ps.available_qty, 0), 0) AS requiredQty FROM client_order co JOIN client_order_detail cod ON co.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(available_qty) AS available_qty FROM product_stock GROUP BY product_id ) ps ON cod.product_id = ps.product_id
co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order_client_order woco WHERE woco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id AND woco.product_id = cod.product_id )
AND ( co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cl.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY co.cl_order_date DESC LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(co.cl_order_id, '-', cod.product_id)) FROM client_order co JOIN client_order_detail cod ON co.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id WHERE co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order_client_order woco WHERE woco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id AND woco.product_id = cod.product_id )
AND ( co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cl.client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT cod.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, cod.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, co.client_id AS clientId, c.client_name AS clientName, co.cl_delivery_date AS dueDate, cod.order_qty AS orderQty, IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty, IFNULL(ps.available_qty, 0) AS availableQty, GREATEST(cod.order_qty - IFNULL(ps.available_qty, 0), 0) AS requiredQty FROM client_order co JOIN client_order_detail cod ON co.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(stock_qty) AS stock_qty, SUM(available_qty) AS available_qty FROM product_stock GROUP BY product_id ) ps ON cod.product_id = ps.product_id WHERE cod.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId} AND cod.product_id = #{productId}
SELECT bom_id FROM bom_master WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY bom_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT material_id AS materialId, material_name AS materialName, unit, material_type AS materialType, qty, qty * #{orderQty} AS totalQty FROM bom_detail WHERE bom_id = #{bomId}
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(order_id, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM work_order WHERE order_id LIKE CONCAT('WO-', #{today}, '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order ( order_id, product_id, line_id, order_qty, priority, status, remarks, due_date, order_manager, created_at ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{lineId}, #{orderQty}, #{priority}, IFNULL(#{status}, 'WAITING'), #{remarks}, #{dueDate}, #{orderManager}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT wco.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, wco.product_id AS productId, wco.order_qty AS orderQty, cl.client_name AS clientName, co.cl_delivery_date AS dueDate FROM work_order_client_order wco JOIN client_order co ON wco.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client cl ON co.client_id = cl.client_id WHERE wco.work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET line_id = #{lineId}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE work_order SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE work_order SET status = 'IN_PROGRESS', updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'READY' AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE work_order SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT w.order_id AS orderId, w.product_id AS productId, w.order_qty AS orderQty, w.priority, w.status, w.created_at AS createdAt, p.product_name AS productName, w.due_date AS dueDate FROM work_order w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.line_id = #{lineId} AND w.status IN ('WAITING', 'READY', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND w.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY CASE w.priority WHEN 'EMERGENCY' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, w.due_date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT wo.order_id AS orderId, wo.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, pl.line_name AS lineName, wo.order_qty AS orderQty, wo.status, COALESCE(pr_sum.produced_qty, 0) AS producedQty, GREATEST(wo.order_qty - COALESCE(pr_sum.produced_qty, 0), 0) AS remainingQty FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN product p ON wo.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON wo.line_id = pl.line_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(GREATEST(actual_qty - COALESCE(defect_qty,0), 0)) AS produced_qty FROM production_result GROUP BY order_id ) pr_sum ON wo.order_id = pr_sum.order_id WHERE wo.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND wo.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY wo.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pr.order_id, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(pr.actual_qty - COALESCE(pr.defect_qty,0),0)), 0) AS good_sum FROM production_result pr WHERE pr.order_id = #{orderId} GROUP BY pr.order_id ) r ON r.order_id = w.order_id SET w.status = CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.good_sum, 0) >= w.order_qty THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE w.status END, w.updated_at = NOW() WHERE w.order_id = #{orderId}
